title: Senior PMO / Project Portfolio Manager (m/w/d)
required_skills: 5-8 years PMO / portfolio management / management consulting experience
Governance structures and project management standards (classic, agile, hybrid)
KPI-based management reporting and decision templates for Steering Committees
Budget planning, forecasts and resource management
High data affinity and strong analytical skills
Business degree or equivalent (Wirtschaft, Informatik, Technik)
bonus_skills: Experience building or scaling a PMO from scratch
Large transformation / IT / ERP project track record
matched_skills: PMO operations and programme governance (HSBC, Hapag-Lloyd)
Agile framework application (Scrum sprint planning, stand-ups, retrospectives)
KPI framework design and performance reporting
Budget tracking and financial governance (USD 8M digital transformation programme)
C-level / executive reporting and data storytelling
High data affinity — Power BI certified (PL-300), dashboard and analytics experience
missing_skills: German at negotiation level (candidate is B1 — significant gap for this role)
Demonstrated experience building or scaling a PMO
5-8 years total PMO experience (candidate has ~1-2 years direct PMO; broader experience partially bridges this)
core_responsibilities: Portfolio steering and roadmap: manage and prioritise the project and transformation portfolio considering business impact, capacity, and risks
Governance and standards: develop unified project management methods (classic, agile, hybrid) and establish clear governance structures
Reporting and analytics: produce KPI-based management reports and decision templates for Steering Committees covering budgets, timelines, and benefits
Financial and resource management: steer budget planning, forecasts, and bottleneck management in coordination with business units and HR
Risk management: proactively identify risks, conduct health checks, and establish clear escalation paths
Coaching and community: mentor project managers, foster knowledge sharing via a Community of Practice, and embed Lessons Learned
recommended_emphasis: Highlight the HSBC PMO role prominently — USD 8M budget governance, 6-workstream coordination, and C-suite reporting directly mirror the JD requirements
Emphasise governance and standards work: programme status tracking, risk escalation, and prioritisation decisions across workstreams
Showcase KPI framework design experience (VfB Stuttgart consulting, HSBC dashboards, Hapag-Lloyd sprint reports) to demonstrate reporting and analytics depth
Lead with Power BI certification and data storytelling skills to address the 'high data affinity' requirement
Frame Hapag-Lloyd role as evidence of agile delivery (Scrum ceremonies) and stakeholder coordination
Address the German language gap proactively — consider noting active improvement or commitment to reaching B2/C1 level
Quantify portfolio and governance impact wherever possible (number of projects managed, stakeholders, budget scale)
Mention mentoring or knowledge-sharing activities to align with the coaching/Community of Practice responsibility
